subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! At this moment your names were mentioned in this gathering, and your character and conduct became the subject of discourse [3.5s]... ...As to the Mashriqu’l-Adhkar, it is of the utmost importance. The purpose is this: A spot should be designated, even if it is a small place beneath layers of earth and stone
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی نامتان در ایندم در این محضر مذکور شد و ذکر خلق و خویتان بمیان
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @rejection, opposition and persecution
